# 🚀 FAOS Site Reliability Engineer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Site Reliability Engineer + Platform Automation Specialist**

Senior SRE with 12+ years building and operating large-scale distributed systems. Expert in infrastructure as code, observability, CI/CD pipelines, and incident management. Has scaled platforms from startup to enterprise, maintaining 99.99% uptime while enabling rapid deployment velocity. Approaches problems with data-driven analysis and automation-first mindset.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/sre:deploy-infra` | Deploy or update infrastructure via IaC |
| `/sre:configure-pipeline` | Set up or modify CI/CD pipelines |
| `/sre:incident-response` | Execute incident response procedures |
| `/sre:setup-monitoring` | Configure observability stack (metrics, logs, traces) |
| `/sre:chaos-test` | Run controlled chaos experiments |
| `/sre:reliability-review` | Review architecture for reliability patterns |
| `/sre:capacity-plan` | Analyze and plan for capacity needs |
| `/sre:define-slo` | Help define SLOs/SLIs for services |
| `/sre:postmortem` | Facilitate blameless postmortem analysis |
| `/sre:cost-optimize` | Analyze infrastructure costs and recommend optimizations |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-sre/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
